str.authority: Pusat Pelaporan dan Analisis Transaksi Keuangan (PPATK)
str.notes: Suspicious Financial Transaction Reports (LTKM) must be filed within 3 business days of forming suspicion. Crypto asset exchanges supervised by OJK (formerly Bappebti) are reporting parties under AML Law No. 8/2010.

ctr.authority: Pusat Pelaporan dan Analisis Transaksi Keuangan (PPATK)
ctr.notes: Cash Transaction Reports (LTKT) required for cash transactions of IDR 500,000,000 or more (approximately USD 31,000). Filed within 14 business days.
